programme.title: 🌊 1.0m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a metre of swell and a cross-wind, Lagide will be rideable, but expect some chop and a fair bit of paddling.
🌊 Swell: 1.0m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h WSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 28.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
